---
title: ""
---

::: {.section-card}
# Experience

::: {.timeline-list}

::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-role"><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> Data Science Intern — GoTo</div>
<div class="timeline-meta">2025</div>

Worked on data science initiatives related to credit risk analysis, model monitoring, and financial data workflows. Contributed to analytical processes that supported risk evaluation and data-driven decision making.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-role"><i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> Corporate Development Intern — GoTo</div>
<div class="timeline-meta">2024</div>

Supported strategic and market research projects through analysis of business trends, industry materials, and financial information. Helped prepare research and presentation materials used for broader strategic discussion.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-role"><i class="bi bi-people"></i> President — Indonesian Bruin Student Association</div>
<div class="timeline-meta">UCLA</div>

Led student programming, planning, and coordination efforts while supporting community engagement on campus. Worked across teams to organize events, manage responsibilities, and strengthen student involvement.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-role"><i class="bi bi-trophy"></i> Data Journalist — Bruin Sports Analytics</div>
<div class="timeline-meta">UCLA</div>

Created sports-focused analytical content that combined data, storytelling, and visual communication. Used quantitative methods to explore performance patterns and present findings in a clear and engaging way.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-card}
## <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Academic Background

As a UCLA Statistics and Data Science student, I have completed work in statistical learning, regression modeling, experimental design, inference, and data analysis. My academic projects apply machine learning methods, classification models, and statistical testing to real-world datasets.
:::

::: {.section-card}
## <i class="bi bi-tools"></i> Tools

R, Python, SQL, Excel, Kubeflow, QuickBI, Quarto, and data visualization workflows for research, reporting, and presentation.
:::
